title: dolicholus angustifolius
intro: Dolicholus angustifolius, also known as Narrow-leaved Dolicholus, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolicholus angustifolius are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dolicholus angustifolius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, such as fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
